name: Te Quiero Candle Set
description: Say it without saying it. A ribbed sage-green glass candle paired with a solid wood coaster, engraved with two hearts and the words "te quiero." Say something else instead, a name, a date, an inside joke, and we'll engrave that. The candle nests into the coaster's recessed center, and a bamboo lid keeps it fresh between burns. Handmade start to finish, and the kind of gift that stays on a nightstand long after it's given.
features: Hand-poured ribbed green glass candle with bamboo lid
